skills.name: plaud-transcript-export
skills.description: Export Plaud/Plaud AI recordings, transcripts, summaries, outlines, and related generated notes through the Plaud Web internal API. Use when a user asks to download or back up Plaud transcripts or summaries, inspect Plaud network/API behavior, avoid DOM scraping, preserve recording metadata, or build a repeatable local export from an authenticated Plaud account.
